title: HONZIN Multitools 6 in 1 Folding Multitool, Pocket Size EDC Multi Tool with Rope Cutter, Bottle Opener, Screwdriver, SIM Card Pin, Camping Stainless Steel Multitools with Nylon Pouch, Gifts for Men
features: ➤6 IN 1 Multitool - This multitools has 6 functions, multi-size slotted screwdriver and multi-size phillips screwdriver, knife, serrated knife, bottle opener, SIM card pin, compact design makes EDC more satisfying for everyday use.

➤Easy to Carry - Size 9.3 x 3.4 x 1.7 cm and net weight 125.8 grams. Come with a well made nylon pouch. The nylon pouchcan be fixed on the belt, and the foldable design can completely save your space!

➤Great Gift Ideas - A must buy if you are looking for a special gift for your loved one's who likes exploring, camping, hiking, fishing, backpacking or simple repair bicycles, etc. This compact multi-tool will fulfill all his demands for the expected and unexpected.
➤Screwdriver Bits - The multi-tool itself has a connector, and the screwdriver of different can be replaced at will. The disassembly design is very convenient to meet your more needs.

➤Quality Service - We aimed to offer good quality products to every customer. If you have any question or suggestion about our products before purchasing and during use, we will be happy to assist you.
